note: Documents intended trigger/behaviour. A real run needs the live toolchain (gh auth, Docker, Supabase, dev server) and the installed `verify` skill, so exercise it by running /check-needs-human-verify in the real repo.

evals.prompt: What do I need to check before I close anything on the backlog?
evals.expected_output: Lists needs-human-verify issues; runs code+integration gates once; per issue uses the verify skill to confirm behaviour; gives plain-language verdict + numbered UAT to-do incl. supabase db push where needed; never closes/pushes prod.

evals.prompt: Is issue #19 safe to close yet?
evals.expected_output: Reads #19 + checklist + CI for its commit, re-runs gates, invokes verify for behaviour, reports a verdict and the exact manual steps/commands for the user to run themselves.

evals.prompt: Go through everything waiting on me for verification and give me a report.
evals.expected_output: Produces verify-report-<date>.md + in-chat summary, one block per issue (confirmed-automatically / your-to-do / recommendation), ends with a 'your move' command list. Does not close issues or push prod.
